AAVE Staking Rewards

Community Airdrop

Claim your share of AAVE tokens as a reward for supporting the AAVE ecosystem

Airdrop Progress

472,300 / 800,000 AAVE claimed

📝 Distribution Process

The AAVE token distribution is designed to reward active community members based on their engagement and contribution to the ecosystem. Here's how it works:

  • Your allocation is calculated based on your transaction history and token holdings
  • Active participation in governance voting increases your eligibility
  • Long-term holders receive additional weight in the distribution
  • New wallets are not eligible to prevent system abuse
